items.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure SQL updates for early-June
items.summary: In early June 2026, the following update and enhancement was made to Azure SQL: Now you can use AES 256 symmetric keys to configure transparent data encryption (TDE) with customer-managed keys in Azure SQL Database. Learn more.
